name: Mariette Rielle
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing a russet felt outfit and russet felt shoes - notably NOT wearing the typical necromancer's robes worn by most of her kind.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: necromancer, cultist, devoted, patient, waiting, hostile
Role: Mariette Rielle is a necromancer working with the Order of the Black Worm. She waits in the Ayleid ruin of Nenyond Twyll, which can only be entered during certain events. Unlike most necromancers, she doesn't wear the typical necromancer's robes, instead dressing in common clothing. She carries a few gold coins and relies on necromancer spells rather than weapons.
Home Location Information: Nenyond Twyll, specifically at the entrance of Nenyond Twyll Riellesel.
Daily Routine: Mariette remains at the entrance of Nenyond Twyll Riellesel, never eating or sleeping, waiting until someone arrives.
Personality - The Patient Cultist: Mariette is dedicated to the Order of the Black Worm and maintains her vigil at the entrance of the Ayleid ruin, waiting with supernatural patience. Her choice to wear common clothing rather than necromancer's robes suggests either a desire for discretion or a different approach to her dark craft compared to other necromancers.
author: Bethesda
